self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can stop Discovery-held routes from being misread as broken lane mismatches when the Engine correctly selected Discovery.
self_improvement.mechanism: The adopted slice adds one bounded equivalence rule between Engine lane discovery and Discovery-held route destinations.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP slice, a real monitor route resolved as broken because the resolver compared selectedLane discovery to routeDestination monitor literally.
self_improvement.expected_effect: Discovery-held routes will resolve more truthfully, and queue rows tied to them will stop surfacing false inconsistency warnings.

decision.rationale: The slice is narrow, shared, and directly removes a false negative in canonical Discovery route integrity.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
